mapper.sql: aoal.id, aoal.oa_order, aoal.nick_name, aoal.user_name, aoal.position, aoal.start_time, aoal.end_time, aoal.total_rest_time, aoal.hours, aoal.month_hours, aoal.review_startTime, aoal.review_endTime, aoal.review_total_rest_time, aoal.review_hours, aoal.reviewer_nick_name, aoal.reviewer_user_name, aoal.review_time, aoal.remarks, aoal.enabled_flag, aoal.attribute1, aoal.attribute2, aoal.attribute3, aoal.attribute4, aoal.attribute5, aoal.create_by, aoal.create_time

${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.oa_order as ${tAlias}_oa_order, ${tAlias}.nick_name as ${tAlias}_nick_name, ${tAlias}.user_name as ${tAlias}_user_name, ${tAlias}.position as ${tAlias}_position, ${tAlias}.start_time as ${tAlias}_start_time, ${tAlias}.end_time as ${tAlias}_end_time, ${tAlias}.total_rest_time as ${tAlias}_total_rest_time, ${tAlias}.hours as ${tAlias}_hours, ${tAlias}.month_hours as ${tAlias}_month_hours, ${tAlias}.review_startTime as ${tAlias}_review_startTime, ${tAlias}.review_endTime as ${tAlias}_review_endTime, ${tAlias}.review_total_rest_time as ${tAlias}_review_total_rest_time, ${tAlias}.review_hours as ${tAlias}_review_hours, ${tAlias}.reviewer_nick_name as ${tAlias}_reviewer_nick_name, ${tAlias}.reviewer_user_name as ${tAlias}_reviewer_user_name, ${tAlias}.review_time as ${tAlias}_review_time, ${tAlias}.remarks as ${tAlias}_remarks, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.attribute1 as ${tAlias}_attribute1, ${tAlias}.attribute2 as ${tAlias}_attribute2, ${tAlias}.attribute3 as ${tAlias}_attribute3, ${tAlias}.attribute4 as ${tAlias}_attribute4, ${tAlias}.attribute5 as ${tAlias}_attribute5, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time
mapper.insert: insert into ac_overtime_application_line (oa_order, nick_name, user_name, position, start_time, end_time, total_rest_time, hours, month_hours, review_startTime, review_endTime, review_total_rest_time, review_hours, reviewer_nick_name, reviewer_user_name, review_time, remarks, enabled_flag, attribute1, attribute2, attribute3, attribute4, attribute5, create_by, create_time) values (#{oaOrder,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{nickName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{position,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{startTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{endTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{totalRestTime,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{hours,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{monthHours,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{reviewStarttime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{reviewEndtime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{reviewTotalRestTime,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{reviewHours,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{reviewerNickName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reviewerUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reviewTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{remarks,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute4,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute5,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
mapper.update: update ac_overtime_application_line set oa_order = #{oaOrder,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, nick_name = #{nickName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, user_name = #{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, position = #{position,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, start_time = #{startTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, end_time = #{endTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, total_rest_time = #{totalRestTime,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, hours = #{hours,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, month_hours = #{monthHours,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, review_startTime = #{reviewStarttime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, review_endTime = #{reviewEndtime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, review_total_rest_time = #{reviewTotalRestTime,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, review_hours = #{reviewHours,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, reviewer_nick_name = #{reviewerNickName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, reviewer_user_name = #{reviewerUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, review_time = #{reviewTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, remarks = #{remarks,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, attribute1 = #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute2 = #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute3 = #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute4 = #{attribute4,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute5 = #{attribute5,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
